name: model-worker-orchestration
description: Generic local-model worker orchestration workflow. It inspects candidate model nodes, assigns independent worker lanes, preserves failures as evidence, and uses fallback lanes instead of hiding model load failures.

steps.title: Snapshot runtime capabilities
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would snapshot available model, vssh, browser, and provider capabilities.

steps.title: Collect model worker facts
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would collect typed facts for model placement.

steps.title: Plan model worker placement
steps.command: meshclaw orchestration-plan "assign planning, reliability review, evidence schema, and automation lanes to available model workers" --json
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would explain why each worker lane is selected.

steps.title: Run planning worker prompt
steps.command: ollama list; timeout 10s ollama run qwen2.5:7b 'Return JSON: {"role":"planning","status":"ready"}'
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would run a small planning prompt on the selected worker lane.

steps.title: Fallback planning prompt on alternate worker
steps.command: ollama list; timeout 10s ollama run qwen2.5:7b 'Return JSON: {"role":"planning_fallback","status":"ready"}'
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would use this alternate worker only when the primary planning worker fails.

steps.title: Run evidence schema worker prompt
steps.command: ollama list; timeout 10s ollama run llama3.2 'Return JSON: {"role":"evidence_schema","status":"ready"}'
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would ask a separate worker to describe evidence fields.

steps.title: Gate automation lane actions
steps.dry_run_note: Running real automation, browser actions, or provider mutations requires explicit approval.
